summary: Iteration 175: Approved Products → Marketplace Wiring, Admin Data Entry Configuration, and Sidebar Alignment testing complete. 19/19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend pages verified working.

seed_data_creation: Created test submissions with TEST_ prefix during testing (TEST_ApprovalProduct, TEST_IdempotentProduct, TEST_MarketplaceSearch, TEST_DetailHideVendor, TEST_RejectProduct, TEST_InvalidStatus)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 175 Approved Products → Marketplace Wiring fully verified. Key findings: (1) POST /api/admin/vendor-supply/submissions/{id}/review with status=approved creates canonical product in products collection via publish_approved_submission service, (2) Re-approving same submission updates existing product (idempotent - no duplicates), (3) GET /api/marketplace/products/search returns approved vendor products with is_active=true, (4) GET /api/marketplace/products/{product_id} hides vendor_id, vendor_name, source_submission_id, vendor_product_code from public, (5) GET /api/admin/business-settings/public returns company info from DB without auth, (6) Admin sidebar shows 'Supply Review' under CATALOG section, (7) Customer sidebar shows 'Services' link between Marketplace and My Orders, (8) Customer marketplace at /account/marketplace shows products with Detail button, (9) Product detail page at /account/marketplace/{productId} renders with breadcrumb navigation, (10) Statement of Account page at /account/statement loads business settings for company header.

vendor_submission_approval.approve_creates_product: PASS - Approval creates canonical product in products collection
vendor_submission_approval.idempotent_reapproval: PASS - Re-approval updates existing product, no duplicates
vendor_submission_approval.reject_submission: PASS - Rejection does not create product

marketplace_search.includes_vendor_products: PASS - Approved vendor products appear in search

product_detail.hides_vendor_info: PASS - vendor_id, vendor_name, source_submission_id, vendor_product_code hidden

business_settings_public.returns_company_info: PASS - Returns company_name, trading_name, tin, brn, address, phone, email, bank info

admin_sidebar.supply_review_under_catalog: PASS - Supply Review link under CATALOG section

customer_sidebar.services_link_position: PASS - Services link between Marketplace and My Orders

customer_marketplace.product_cards_with_detail: PASS - Product cards have Detail button

product_detail_page.breadcrumb_navigation: PASS - Breadcrumb shows Marketplace > Product Name
product_detail_page.back_to_marketplace: PASS - Back to Marketplace link works

statement_page.company_header: PASS - Shows company info from business settings
statement_page.ledger_table: PASS - Shows transactions with opening/closing balance

health_and_auth.vendor_auth: PASS - Vendor login works (partner-auth endpoint returns access_token)
